get.description: Whether the optimizer is enabled for this greenhouse or paused just for it (the per-greenhouse analog of GET /api/optimizer/enabled). Independent of the service-wide enable; effective planning requires both, and the global pause takes precedence. Polled. Open to anyone — reads need no token (anonymous-viewer posture, platform security §4).

post.summary: Pause / resume planning for one greenhouse
post.description: Enable or disable the optimizer for a single greenhouse at runtime (operator only, slice 3). Disabling skips this greenhouse's scheduled cycles and setpoint writes immediately — no plan is produced for it — even while the service is globally enabled; reads still served. Gated exactly like POST /api/optimizer/enabled and the model switch. In-memory override; resets to the configured default on restart.

200.description: The per-greenhouse enable state after the change.
